nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 凤头麦鸡
nodes.summary: 凤头麦鸡（Northern lapwing，学名 Vanellus vanellus），主要威胁包括猎捕压力。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The threats are thought to be the intensification of land use and hunting, but further investigations are required to clarify the threats. In the Middle East, the northern lapwing is threatened by overhunting, as large numbers of them are along their winter migration routes
